## Motivation

What user-facing report problem does this solve?

## Why plain Markdown is insufficient

Explain why this should not stay as prose, a list, or a normal Markdown table.

## Proposed info string

```text
aio:name@1
```

## Proposed schema

```json
{}
```

## Example

````md
```aio:name@1
{}
```
````
